datasets.name: 30d30e9a
queryLines:
SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN coin_id IN ('btc', 'bitcoin')           THEN 'bitcoin'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('bnb', 'binancecoin')       THEN 'binancecoin'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('eth', 'ethereum')           THEN 'ethereum'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('sol', 'solana')             THEN 'solana'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('ada', 'cardano')            THEN 'cardano'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('xrp', 'ripple')             THEN 'ripple'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('doge', 'dogecoin')          THEN 'dogecoin'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('dot', 'polkadot')           THEN 'polkadot'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('link', 'chainlink')         THEN 'chainlink'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('avax', 'avalanche-2')       THEN 'avalanche'
        ELSE coin_id
    END AS coin_id,
    trade_date,
    close,
    moving_avg_7d,
    daily_return_pct
FROM crypto_analytics.gold.daily_market_summary
WHERE coin_id = 'btc'
  AND trade_date >= '2025-01-01'
ORDER BY trade_date

datasets.name: df2ec882
queryLines:
SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN coin_id IN ('btc', 'bitcoin')           THEN 'bitcoin'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('bnb', 'binancecoin')       THEN 'binancecoin'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('eth', 'ethereum')           THEN 'ethereum'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('sol', 'solana')             THEN 'solana'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('ada', 'cardano')            THEN 'cardano'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('xrp', 'ripple')             THEN 'ripple'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('doge', 'dogecoin')          THEN 'dogecoin'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('dot', 'polkadot')           THEN 'polkadot'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('link', 'chainlink')         THEN 'chainlink'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('avax', 'avalanche-2')       THEN 'avalanche'
        ELSE coin_id
    END AS coin_id,
    trade_date,
    close,
    moving_avg_7d
FROM crypto_analytics.gold.daily_market_summary
WHERE trade_date >= '2025-01-01'

datasets.name: 78ec41bf
queryLines:
SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN coin_id IN ('btc', 'bitcoin')       THEN 'bitcoin'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('bnb', 'binancecoin')   THEN 'binancecoin'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('eth', 'ethereum')       THEN 'ethereum'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('sol', 'solana')         THEN 'solana'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('ada', 'cardano')        THEN 'cardano'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('xrp', 'ripple')         THEN 'ripple'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('doge', 'dogecoin')      THEN 'dogecoin'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('dot', 'polkadot')       THEN 'polkadot'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('link', 'chainlink')     THEN 'chainlink'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('avax', 'avalanche-2')   THEN 'avalanche'
        ELSE coin_id
    END AS coin_id,
    MAX(volatility_stddev)    AS volatility_stddev,
    MAX(avg_daily_return_pct) AS avg_daily_return_pct,
    MAX(best_day_return_pct)  AS best_day_return_pct,
    MIN(worst_day_return_pct) AS worst_day_return_pct,
    MAX(risk_tier)            AS risk_tier,
    MAX(total_trading_days)   AS total_trading_days
FROM crypto_analytics.gold.coin_volatility
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY volatility_stddev DESC

datasets.name: d6e0e4e0
queryLines:
SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN coin_id IN ('btc', 'bitcoin')           THEN 'bitcoin'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('bnb', 'binancecoin')       THEN 'binancecoin'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('eth', 'ethereum')           THEN 'ethereum'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('sol', 'solana')             THEN 'solana'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('ada', 'cardano')            THEN 'cardano'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('xrp', 'ripple')             THEN 'ripple'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('doge', 'dogecoin')          THEN 'dogecoin'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('dot', 'polkadot')           THEN 'polkadot'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('link', 'chainlink')         THEN 'chainlink'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('avax', 'avalanche-2')       THEN 'avalanche'
        ELSE coin_id
    END AS coin_id,
    month,
    monthly_return_pct,
    best_single_day_pct,
    worst_single_day_pct,
    rank
FROM crypto_analytics.gold.top_performers_monthly
WHERE month >= '2025-01'
ORDER BY month DESC, rank ASC

datasets.name: 13c5a186
queryLines:
SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN coin_id IN ('btc', 'bitcoin')           THEN 'bitcoin'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('bnb', 'binancecoin')       THEN 'binancecoin'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('eth', 'ethereum')           THEN 'ethereum'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('sol', 'solana')             THEN 'solana'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('ada', 'cardano')            THEN 'cardano'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('xrp', 'ripple')             THEN 'ripple'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('doge', 'dogecoin')          THEN 'dogecoin'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('dot', 'polkadot')           THEN 'polkadot'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('link', 'chainlink')         THEN 'chainlink'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('avax', 'avalanche-2')       THEN 'avalanche'
        ELSE coin_id
    END AS coin_id,
    symbol,
    snapshot_date,
    market_cap_usd,
    dominance_pct,
    current_price,
    mcap_rank
FROM crypto_analytics.gold.market_cap_dominance
ORDER BY mcap_rank ASC

datasets.name: 0b777f59
queryLines:
SELECT
    month,
    CASE
        WHEN coin_id IN ('btc', 'bitcoin')           THEN 'bitcoin'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('bnb', 'binancecoin')       THEN 'binancecoin'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('eth', 'ethereum')           THEN 'ethereum'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('sol', 'solana')             THEN 'solana'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('ada', 'cardano')            THEN 'cardano'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('xrp', 'ripple')             THEN 'ripple'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('doge', 'dogecoin')          THEN 'dogecoin'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('dot', 'polkadot')           THEN 'polkadot'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('link', 'chainlink')         THEN 'chainlink'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('avax', 'avalanche-2')       THEN 'avalanche'
        ELSE coin_id
    END AS coin_id,
    monthly_return_pct
FROM crypto_analytics.gold.top_performers_monthly
WHERE rank = 1
  AND month >= '2025-01'
ORDER BY month DESC

datasets.name: 61b66255
queryLines:
SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN coin_id IN ('btc', 'bitcoin')           THEN 'bitcoin'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('bnb', 'binancecoin')       THEN 'binancecoin'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('eth', 'ethereum')           THEN 'ethereum'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('sol', 'solana')             THEN 'solana'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('ada', 'cardano')            THEN 'cardano'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('xrp', 'ripple')             THEN 'ripple'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('doge', 'dogecoin')          THEN 'dogecoin'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('dot', 'polkadot')           THEN 'polkadot'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('link', 'chainlink')         THEN 'chainlink'
        WHEN coin_id IN ('avax', 'avalanche-2')       THEN 'avalanche'
        ELSE coin_id
    END AS coin_id,
    DATE_FORMAT(trade_date, 'yyyy-MM') AS month,
    ROUND(AVG(daily_return_pct), 2)    AS avg_monthly_return
FROM crypto_analytics.gold.daily_market_summary
WHERE trade_date >= '2025-01-01'
GROUP BY coin_id, DATE_FORMAT(trade_date, 'yyyy-MM')
ORDER BY coin_id, month

datasets.name: 2db6c1ff
queryLines:
WITH cleaned AS (
    SELECT
        CASE
            WHEN coin_id IN ('btc', 'bitcoin')       THEN 'bitcoin'
            WHEN coin_id IN ('bnb', 'binancecoin')   THEN 'binancecoin'
            WHEN coin_id IN ('eth', 'ethereum')       THEN 'ethereum'
            WHEN coin_id IN ('sol', 'solana')         THEN 'solana'
            WHEN coin_id IN ('ada', 'cardano')        THEN 'cardano'
            WHEN coin_id IN ('xrp', 'ripple')         THEN 'ripple'
            WHEN coin_id IN ('doge', 'dogecoin')      THEN 'dogecoin'
            WHEN coin_id IN ('dot', 'polkadot')       THEN 'polkadot'
            WHEN coin_id IN ('link', 'chainlink')     THEN 'chainlink'
            WHEN coin_id IN ('avax', 'avalanche-2')   THEN 'avalanche'
            ELSE coin_id
        END AS coin_id,
        trade_date
    FROM crypto_analytics.gold.daily_market_summary
)
SELECT 'Total Coins'        AS metric, COUNT(DISTINCT coin_id)  AS value FROM cleaned
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Total Trading Days' AS metric, COUNT(DISTINCT trade_date) AS value FROM cleaned
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Total Records'      AS metric, COUNT(*)                 AS value FROM cleaned
